WSU453_SBOX_0x0230_00.01.11.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7C6
Recv ID: 7D1
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 48
Func Name: WSU

    "name": "DataRead.ECUSerialNumberDataIdentifierKCH Read",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "KCH Serial Number.2": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "replybytes": "620506000000",
    "sentbytes": "220506",
    "name": "DataRead.systemSupplierECUHardwareVersionNumberDataIdentifierKCH Read",
    "deny_sds": [],

  },
  {

    "replybytes": "62F10000000000",
    "sentbytes": "22F100",
    "name": "DataRead.Active Diagnostic Information Read",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Active Diagnostic Version": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Active Diagnostic Variant": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Gateway": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Identification.2": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Active Diagnostic Session": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      }
    }
  },

    "replybytes": "62F11100000000000000000000",
    "sentbytes": "22F111",

  },

    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 8
      },

        "firstbyte": 7
      },

        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "SW - week LPC App": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "SW - year LPC App": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },

        "firstbyte": 15
      },

        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "SW - year BB FW": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "SW - patch level BB App": {
        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "SW - week BB App": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "SW - year BB App": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      }
    }
  },
